item.title: This is Good Sportsmanship
item.description: Eric Moussambani Malonga, nicknamed “Eric the Eel,” became famous at the 2000 Sydney Olympics—not for his speed, but for his incredible determination. Representing Equatorial Guinea, he had never seen an Olympic-sized pool before and had trained alone for only eight months in a small hotel pool. During the men’s 100m freestyle heats on September 19, 2000, both of his competitors false-started, leaving him to swim alone. He finished with a time of 1:52.72—the slowest in Olympic history—but set a personal best and a national record. More: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eric_Moussambani
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.dc:creator: factcheckmate

item.title: Another day, a better walk!
item.description:
I started the journey of recovery 4 years ago when I essentially crushed everything from the waist down. A couple weeks back I was able to be emotionally vulnerable and show my progress knowing that some might make fun of the weight I gained being bed bound and non weight beating for 2.5 years. I wasn't supposed to walk again at all, but today I walked my hallway and back again without my leg braces! It was easier this time!
My curvy spine doesn't really allow me to stand upright.
At the time, I shattered my pelvis and L3-5.
Right leg rocking its android equipment.
And my left leg as well, though since that x-ray, they fused my ankle completely on that side and pinned my big toe straight.
These were my original Lieutenant Dan leg braces that allowed me to get up and walk. They were heavy and painful and my progress was plateaued so I decided to start practicing standing without them. Then I started counter side-stepping. Then walking with my walker.
Android toe on my reconstructed left foot. I call it my Temu foot because it's vaguely foot shaped but not quite right. I show everyone this to remind myself and everyone never to stop. You Are stronger than you think and I love every one of you. I'm proud of you all. Whatever fight you may be fighting. Whatever personal demons. Don't give up because this internet stranger believes in you.
item.dc:creator: Bloodyvalentine549

item.title: The 521st vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 11
item.description:
This is what we're fighting for. A better world.
We will not stand by
We will not be quiet
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse (The Stable) and PotatoCheesMonk's (Deviousness) Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. https://discord.gg/JoinTheStable https://discord.gg/Deviousness These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk. @PlanckEraWasMyBestEra also has a server for Parents who are Trans https://discord.gg/transparents
We will fight
I hope this is real
Fukkin Dave
Young Homo Love
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: Nezza Ignored LA Dodgers’ Request for English National Anthem, Chose the Spanish Version Instead: ‘Para Mi Gente’
item.description: Nezza sang “El Pendón Estrellado,” the official Spanish version of the national anthem. The song was commissioned by President Franklin D. Roosevelt in 1945. Clotilde Arias, a journalist and professional musician who had immigrated to the United States from Peru, was asked to translate the anthem into Spanish. That history made Nezza’s decision all the more poignant, especially as protests against Trump were organized across the nation Saturday. A “No Kings” protest in Los Angeles drew 30,000 participants yesterday. “We are going to do the song in English today,” someone with the Dodgers told Nezza in another video she posted Sunday. “I’m not sure if that wasn’t relayed.” The singer sang the song she wanted to perform anyway, all while wearing a shirt representing the Dominican Republic. “I didn’t think I’d be met with any sort of no,” Nezza said in one of her videos. “Especially because we’re in L.A., and with everything happening. I’ve sang the national anthem many times in my life, but today, out of all days, I could not. I just felt like I needed to do it. Para mi gente.” The New York Times reported Sunday Nezza was not kicked out of the stadium and she has not been banned from future appearances. With the exception of Kiké Hernández, the Dodgers have been silent on the ongoing protests. “I may not be Born & Raised, but this city adopted me as one of their own. I am saddened and infuriated by what’s happening in our country and our city. Los Angeles and Dodger fans have welcomed me, supported me and shown me nothing but kindness and love.” “This is my second home. And I cannot stand to see our community being violated, profiled, abused and ripped apart. ALL people deserve to be treated with respect, dignity and human rights. #CityOfImmigrants,” he captioned a post shared via Instagram Saturday. The caption was also shared in Spanish. https://www.thewrap.com/nezza-ignored-la-dodgers-request-for-english-national-anthem-chose-the-spanish-version-instead-para-mi-gente/ According to The Athletic, Hernandez is “not expected” to be banned from Dodger Stadium and was not asked to leave the venue on Saturday night after the anthem. The Dodgers declined to comment to The Athletic about Hernandez’s videos. The team has also not made any public statement about the protests since they began last Friday. https://www.sfgate.com/giants/article/dodgers-tried-to-stop-spanish-us-anthem-sf-giants-20378533.php

item.dc:creator: amtronic

item.title: They're shaking in their boots
item.description: Our nurses are paid like shit (well we all are here, I'm a pharmacist but tomorrow is my last night). Almost every department is critically understaffed, especially nursing. They have unsafe ratios on almost every floor. This means, for example, 1 nurse taking care of 6 or 7 patients. They're trying to unionize. My fiancee recently sustained what I believe to be a torn rotator cuff, which is an overuse injury, mainly because she needs to turn patients by herself the vast majority of the time. Overuse injuries are far and away the biggest source of hospital workplace injury. The Chief HR Officer sent this email tonight to every employee, likely from their ivory tower. Fuck off, and fuck you. Remember everybody, if Big Corp tries to dissuade you from doing something, you're probably doing the right thing.
item.dc:creator: DancingPanther

item.title: T & C's apply
item.description: Make try it yourself https://translate.google.com/?sl=auto&tl=en&text=poopen%20sharten%20farten&op=translate Be sure to click play to hear it also. Reminds me of a certain Def Leppard song, also Offspring. https://ultimateclassicrock.com/def-leppard-rock-of-ages-opening-lyrics/ If you ever do any business in India, make sure to ask for the poopen sharten farten. But make sure it's the right kind of business. I do not know Hindi nor do I claim to, so please read the poopen sharten farten clearly before any purchases.
item.dc:creator: Mostlywibbly

item.title: 80lbs down...
item.description:
Size 5x shirt for reference... I don't have a before photo in this shirt. Full body pics for me was just a no for me dawg
I am feeling a bit overwhelmed. Happy that I've gotten this far in my journey, bummed I ever got to the point of needing this journey... I'm officially 80lbs down from 285. Loose skin around my inner thighs, I still have the apron belly, and I still have bat-wing arms. But... I have lost the equivelent of 2 big ass bags of Costco dog food, I can walk a lot longer (at least 3-4 miles a day) I've been consistent at the gym, my calf and thugh muscles are THICC and I'm pretty fucking proud! Please be kind. Send inappropriate memes/gifs, workout playlist recommendations and words of encouragement.
item.dc:creator: Sugarbritches21
